commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in active-run queue wait for an assistant response after transcript commit and enables it for subagent completion handoff wake paths.

PR surface: Source +53, Tests +102. Total +155 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: emit the matching queued user `message_end`, then end the requester run before any assistant response; current main has already resolved the queue wait and dispatch can record the completion as delivered. I did not execute a live reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is maintainer acceptance plus contributor-supplied real runtime proof, not a safe automated code repair.
